failure_movement.justification: Unknown shrink direction right (predicted -2..-4, actual -6, near band). But 8cf51dda 'fail->pass' is contradicted: it already passed in iter19. Wrong predicted flat/+1 yet actually dropped 11->7. Empty predicted flat ~1 but rose 2->4, a missed regression.

trace_movement.justification: Token-flat claim confirmed (1592.6->1600.6, 220.2->221.4). But cited 8cf51dda trace claim rests on false fail premise; 7405e8b1 still failed ('unknown'), so the claim that buried quantitative/temporal sentences now surface is unconfirmed for its own example.

side_effects.justification: Token-unchanged call confirmed. 'No-regression on wrong-answer synthesis' held (wrong dropped 11->7). But the explicit claim that empty-output risk should not increase is contradicted: empty predictions rose 2->4, a regression the prediction missed.
